text: Worked Remote, There were no appointments for me only for Arleth and she said it was fine if I wanted to stay. SATURDAY Date @March 15, 2025 Type Attendance Notes Remote work included client outreach, document management, project management improvements, and client support initiatives, totaling an estimated 13-17 hours focused on optimizing client services and operational efficiency.
